classificationCriteria.fullyProtected: OrgDataAuthorization enforcement on read, export, AI/MCP AND ingestion; REVOKED/EXPIRED blocks all stages.
classificationCriteria.partiallyProtected: At least one assertDataAuthorization OR IAM+ledger signal but incomplete coverage.
classificationCriteria.unprotected: No OrgDataAuthorization runtime enforcement; IAM/org-scoping only.

paths.name: DIMO Live GPS

paths.name: HM Telemetry MQTT (staged)
